entry.title: FIXTURE: Boron solubility in silicon at high temperature — measurements and modelling
entry.summary: Synthetic abstract for selftest replay. Reports boron solubility in silicon single crystals between 1200 and 1450 K. Compares Czochralski-grown samples with float-zone refined ingots. Discusses the dopant ceiling relevant to electronic-grade poly-Si feedstock. This is a fixture; no real research is claimed.

entry.title: FIXTURE: GaN-on-SiC HEMT epitaxy advances for wide-bandgap power devices
entry.summary: Synthetic abstract for selftest replay. Reviews 4H-SiC substrate quality and GaN epitaxy progress for high-electron-mobility transistors. Touches on compound-semi wafer dislocation density and threading-dislocation reduction. Fixture only; not real research.

entry.title: FIXTURE: Perovskite solar cell long-term stability — encapsulation strategy
entry.summary: Synthetic abstract for selftest replay. Studies perovskite halide MAPbI3 films under accelerated UV+thermal+humidity stress. Reports encapsulation strategies. NOTE: 25-year operational lifetime is UNVERIFIED at commercial scale. Fixture only; not real research.
